channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: ParserComp 2026 Hosted by fos1 1 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-04-26 12:00:00 to 2026-06-28 12:00:00 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Schedule - Join the Comp: 27 April 2026 - Submission window opens: 27 April 2026 - Deadline for g
